SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
CompressorAntiSurgeApplication
public static class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication extends Object implements Serializable
Stage-level anti-surge application configuration.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • StageApplication

      public StageApplication(String name)
      Create stage configuration.
      Parameters:
      name - stage name

  • Method Details

    • addMarginSignal

      public AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.InstrumentSignal addMarginSignal(String signalName, double minimum, double maximum, double lagTime)
      Add a simulated margin transmitter.
      Parameters:
      signalName - signal name
      minimum - minimum valid value
      maximum - maximum valid value
      lagTime - lag time in seconds
      Returns:
      created signal

    • updateSignals

      private void updateSignals(double margin, double dt)
      Update all margin signals.
      Parameters:
      margin - margin value
      dt - timestep in seconds

    • setSignalFault

      public void setSignalFault(int index, AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.SensorFault fault, double parameter)
      Inject a fault into a configured margin transmitter.
      Parameters:
      index - signal index
      fault - fault type
      parameter - fault parameter

    • setCompressor

      public void setCompressor(Compressor compressor)
      Set compressor object.
      Parameters:
      compressor - compressor object

    • bindTopology

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding bindTopology(ProcessSystem process, Compressor compressor, ThrottlingValve hotRecycleValve, ThrottlingValve coldRecycleValve)
      Bind this stage to a real NeqSim topology.
      Parameters:
      process - process system containing the topology; may be null when command writeback only is needed
      compressor - compressor unit to read margin and write speed commands
      hotRecycleValve - fast hot recycle valve; may be null
      coldRecycleValve - normal cold recycle valve; may be null
      Returns:
      topology binding for further configuration

    • bindTopology

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding bindTopology(ProcessSystem process, Compressor compressor, ThrottlingValve hotRecycleValve, ThrottlingValve coldRecycleValve, Cooler aftercooler, Mixer suctionMixer, Recycle hotRecycle, Recycle coldRecycle)
      Bind this stage to a complete real NeqSim recycle topology.
      Parameters:
      process - process system containing the topology; may be null when command writeback only is needed
      compressor - compressor unit to read margin and write speed commands
      hotRecycleValve - fast hot recycle valve; may be null
      coldRecycleValve - normal cold recycle valve; may be null
      aftercooler - recycle/discharge cooler; may be null
      suctionMixer - suction mixer receiving recycle flow; may be null
      hotRecycle - hot recycle tear block; may be null
      coldRecycle - cold recycle tear block; may be null
      Returns:
      topology binding for further configuration

    • getTopologyBinding

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.TopologyBinding getTopologyBinding()
      Get topology binding.
      Returns:
      topology binding, or null if the stage is data-driven only

    • getCompressor

      public Compressor getCompressor()
      Get compressor object.
      Returns:
      compressor object, or null

    • setDesignBasis

      public void setDesignBasis(double designInletFlow, double designSurgeFlow, double designSuctionDensity)
      Set design basis.
      Parameters:
      designInletFlow - design inlet flow in m3/hr
      designSurgeFlow - design surge flow in m3/hr
      designSuctionDensity - design suction density in kg/m3

    • setRecycleDesign

      public void setRecycleDesign(double controlMargin, double valvePressureDrop, double recyclePipingVolume, double requiredResponseTime)
      Set recycle design basis.
      Parameters:
      controlMargin - control margin
      valvePressureDrop - valve pressure drop in bar
      recyclePipingVolume - recycle piping volume in m3
      requiredResponseTime - required response time in seconds

    • setValveStrokeTimes

      public void setValveStrokeTimes(double hotValveStrokeTime, double coldValveStrokeTime)
      Set valve stroke times.
      Parameters:
      hotValveStrokeTime - hot valve stroke time in seconds
      coldValveStrokeTime - cold valve stroke time in seconds

    • setVotingMode

      public void setVotingMode(AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.VotingMode votingMode)
      Set voting mode.
      Parameters:
      votingMode - voting mode

      Get hot valve stroke time.
      Returns:
      hot valve stroke time in seconds

      public double getColdValveStrokeTime()
      Get cold valve stroke time.
      Returns:
      cold valve stroke time in seconds

    • setLastHotValveOpening

      private void setLastHotValveOpening(double lastHotValveOpening)
      Set last hot valve opening.
      Parameters:
      lastHotValveOpening - hot valve opening in percent

    • setLastColdValveOpening

      private void setLastColdValveOpening(double lastColdValveOpening)
      Set last cold valve opening.
      Parameters:
      lastColdValveOpening - cold valve opening in percent

      Get last cold valve opening.
